steps: Go to https://app.withpersona.com and sign in or create an account
In the left sidebar, navigate to 'API Keys' (or go to https://app.withpersona.com/dashboard/api-keys)
You will see a Sandbox API key already available for immediate use
To create a new key, click 'Add API Key', give it a name and select its permissions
Copy the API key — it begins with a prefix identifying the environment (sandbox or production)
Use the key as a Bearer token in the Authorization header of all API requests

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Persona API key (used as Bearer token in Authorization header)

notes: Sandbox API key is available immediately upon account creation — no credit card required
Sandbox and Production have separate API keys — ensure you use the correct one
All API requests must include the Persona-Version header (e.g. 2023-01-05)
Identity verification requires configuring Inquiry Templates in the dashboard before creating inquiries via API

test_endpoint.description: List inquiries to verify the API key
